## 📰 Hacker News Highlights / 黑客新闻精选

### Nano Banana 2: Google's Latest AI Image Generation Model

* Google announces Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image), combining the advanced capabilities of Nano Banana Pro with significantly faster processing speed
* The original Nano Banana launched in August as a viral sensation, revolutionizing image generation and editing capabilities
* Nano Banana Pro was released in November, providing users with enhanced intelligence and studio-quality creative control
* Nano Banana 2 delivers the same advanced world knowledge, quality, and reasoning as Pro version but at lightning-fast speed
* The new model represents Google's effort to merge high-quality AI image generation with improved performance across their platforms

### Nano Banana 2：Google 最新 AI 图像生成模型

* Google 发布 Nano Banana 2（Gemini 3.1 Flash Image），将 Nano Banana Pro 的高级功能与显著提升的处理速度相结合
* 原版 Nano Banana 于去年 8 月推出后迅速走红，重新定义了图像生成和编辑能力
* Nano Banana Pro 于 11 月发布，为用户提供增强的智能和工作室级别的创意控制
* Nano Banana 2 提供与 Pro 版本相同的先进世界知识、质量和推理能力，但速度快如闪电
* 新模型代表了 Google 在其平台上融合高质量 AI 图像生成与改进性能的努力

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/nano-banana-2/)**

### AirSnitch: A New Wi-Fi Encryption Attack Threatening Global Network Security

* AirSnitch is a novel Wi-Fi attack that breaks encryption across homes, offices, and enterprises, enabling advanced cyberattacks like cookie stealing, DNS poisoning, and cache poisoning
* Unlike previous attacks (WEP, WPA) that exploited encryption vulnerabilities, AirSnitch targets the lowest networking stack layers (Layer-1 and Layer-2)
* The attack exploits cross-layer identity desynchronization—the failure to bind and synchronize clients across different network layers, nodes, and SSIDs
* Enables full bidirectional machine-in-the-middle (MitM) attacks, allowing attackers to view and modify data in transit
* Works across different network configurations: same SSID, separate SSIDs, or even different network segments connected to the same access point
* Research presented by Xin'an Zhou at the 2026 Network and Distributed System Security Symposium
* Poses a significant threat to worldwide network security by physically wiretapping communications

### AirSnitch:突破全球Wi-Fi加密的新型攻击威胁

* AirSnitch是一种新型Wi-Fi攻击,可突破家庭、办公室和企业网络的加密,实现cookie窃取、DNS投毒和缓存投毒等高级网络攻击
* 与以往攻击WEP、WPA加密漏洞不同,AirSnitch针对网络堆栈最底层(第1层和第2层)发起攻击
* 该攻击利用跨层身份不同步问题——客户端在不同网络层、节点和SSID之间无法正确绑定和同步
* 可实现完整的双向中间人(MitM)攻击,攻击者能够查看和修改传输中的数据
* 适用于多种网络配置:相同SSID、不同SSID,甚至连接到同一接入点的不同网段
* 研究由周新安在2026年网络与分布式系统安全研讨会上发表
* 通过物理窃听通信对全球网络安全构成重大威胁

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://arstechnica.com/security/2026/02/new-airsnitch-attack-breaks-wi-fi-encryption-in-homes-offices-and-enterprises/)**

## 🔥 GitHub Trending / GitHub 热门项目

### SpacetimeDB - A Database and Server Combined Into One for Real-Time Applications

* **What it does**: SpacetimeDB merges database and server into a single system where clients connect directly to the database and execute application logic through "modules" (stored procedures). It eliminates the traditional web/game server layer, allowing you to write your entire backend in Rust and deploy as a single binary.

* **Key features**: In-memory state for ultra-low latency; real-time synchronization to clients; write-ahead-log (WAL) for persistence; supports Rust and C# modules; optimized for real-time apps like games, chat, and collaboration tools; powers the MMORPG BitCraft Online's entire backend.

* **Why it's notable**: Gaining 469 stars today, SpacetimeDB offers a radical simplification of backend architecture—no microservices, containers, Kubernetes, or DevOps complexity. It's orders of magnitude faster than smart contract systems while providing similar direct-to-database logic execution. The fact that a full MMORPG runs entirely on SpacetimeDB modules demonstrates its production-ready performance for demanding real-time workloads.

---

### SpacetimeDB - 将数据库与服务器合二为一的实时应用平台

* **功能介绍**: SpacetimeDB 将数据库和服务器融合为一个系统,客户端直接连接数据库并通过"模块"(存储过程)执行应用逻辑。它消除了传统的 Web/游戏服务器层,让你可以用 Rust 编写整个后端并部署为单个二进制文件。

* **主要特点**: 内存状态实现超低延迟;实时同步到客户端;预写日志(WAL)持久化;支持 Rust 和 C# 模块;专为游戏、聊天和协作工具等实时应用优化;为 MMORPG《BitCraft Online》提供完整后端支持。

* **为何值得关注**: 今日获得 469 星标,SpacetimeDB 彻底简化了后端架构——无需微服务、容器、Kubernetes 或复杂的 DevOps。它比智能合约系统快几个数量级,同时提供类似的直接数据库逻辑执行能力。一款完整的 MMORPG 完全运行在 SpacetimeDB 模块上,充分证明了其在高要求实时工作负载下的生产就绪性能。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/clockworklabs/SpacetimeDB)**

### Superpowers - Agentic Skills Framework for AI Coding Agents

* **What it does**: A complete software development workflow system that transforms AI coding agents into disciplined developers. Instead of jumping straight into code, agents first clarify requirements, create digestible specs, build detailed implementation plans, then execute through autonomous subagent-driven development with built-in testing and review cycles.

* **Key features**: Composable skills library covering the full dev lifecycle - brainstorming (Socratic design refinement), test-driven development (strict RED-GREEN-REFACTOR), systematic debugging, git worktree management, subagent dispatching with two-stage reviews, and automated code review workflows. Supports Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and OpenCode platforms via plugin marketplaces.

* **Why it's notable**: Gained 1,528 stars today by solving a critical problem - AI agents that write untested, poorly planned code. Enforces engineering discipline (TDD, YAGNI, DRY) through mandatory workflows rather than suggestions. Enables Claude to work autonomously for hours without deviating from approved plans. The subagent-driven approach with spec compliance + code quality reviews creates a scalable system where junior-level execution follows senior-level planning.

---

### Superpowers - AI 编码代理的技能框架

* **功能介绍**: 为 AI 编码代理打造的完整软件开发工作流系统。代理不会直接开始写代码,而是先澄清需求、创建易读的规格说明、构建详细实施计划,然后通过自主的子代理驱动开发流程执行,内置测试和审查循环。

* **主要特点**: 可组合的技能库覆盖完整开发生命周期 - 头脑风暴(苏格拉底式设计优化)、测试驱动开发(严格的红-绿-重构循环)、系统化调试、Git 工作树管理、带两阶段审查的子代理调度、自动化代码审查工作流。通过插件市场支持 Claude Code、Cursor、Codex 和 OpenCode 平台。

* **为何值得关注**: 今日获得 1,528 星标,解决了 AI 代理编写未测试、计划不周代码的关键问题。通过强制性工作流(而非建议)执行工程纪律(TDD、YAGNI、DRY 原则)。使 Claude 能够按照批准的计划自主工作数小时而不偏离方向。子代理驱动方法结合规格合规性和代码质量审查,创建了可扩展系统,让初级执行遵循高级规划。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/obra/superpowers)**

### Agent Skills for Context Engineering - Production-Grade Context Management for AI Agents

* **What it does**: A comprehensive collection of modular skills teaching context engineering—the discipline of managing language model context windows through strategic curation of system prompts, tool definitions, retrieved documents, and message history to maximize agent effectiveness

* **Key features**: 
  - 12+ modular skills across foundational (context fundamentals, degradation patterns, compression), architectural (multi-agent patterns, memory systems, tool design, hosted agents), operational (optimization, evaluation), and cognitive architecture domains
  - Platform-agnostic principles working across Claude Code, Cursor, and any agent framework
  - Progressive disclosure design—agents load only skill names initially, full content activates on-demand
  - Production examples including digital brain systems, X-to-book pipelines, and LLM-as-judge implementations
  - Claude Code Plugin Marketplace integration with automatic skill discovery and activation

* **Why it's notable**: Cited in academic research from Peking University as foundational work on static skill architecture; addresses the critical challenge that context windows are constrained by attention mechanics (lost-in-the-middle phenomenon, U-shaped attention curves) rather than raw token capacity; provides transferable patterns for building production agent systems with effective context management at scale

---

### Agent Skills for Context Engineering - AI 智能体的生产级上下文管理

* **功能介绍**: 全面的模块化技能集合,教授上下文工程——通过策略性管理系统提示、工具定义、检索文档和消息历史来管理语言模型上下文窗口的学科,以最大化智能体效能

* **主要特点**:
  - 12+ 个模块化技能,涵盖基础(上下文基本原理、退化模式、压缩)、架构(多智能体模式、内存系统、工具设计、托管智能体)、运营(优化、评估)和认知架构领域
  - 平台无关原则,适用于 Claude Code、Cursor 及任何智能体框架
  - 渐进式披露设计——智能体初始仅加载技能名称,完整内容按需激活
  - 生产级示例包括数字大脑系统、X-to-book 管道和 LLM-as-judge 实现
  - Claude Code 插件市场集成,支持自动技能发现和激活

* **为何值得关注**: 被北京大学学术研究引用为静态技能架构的基础性工作;解决了上下文窗口受注意力机制(中间丢失现象、U 型注意力曲线)而非原始 token 容量约束的关键挑战;为构建具有大规模有效上下文管理的生产级智能体系统提供可迁移模式

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/muratcankoylan/Agent-Skills-for-Context-Engineering)**


## 🚀 Fast-Moving Repos / 快速崛起项目

### vinext - Next.js API reimplemented on Vite for flexible deployment

* **What it does**: A Vite plugin that recreates the entire Next.js API surface (routing, SSR, RSC, CLI) so existing Next.js apps can run on Vite's toolchain instead of Next.js's compiler. Supports both Pages Router and App Router with one-command migration via `vinext init`.

* **Key features**: Automated migration that preserves your existing Next.js setup; 94% API compatibility with Next.js 16.x; fast HMR via Vite; built-in Cloudflare Workers deployment with `vinext deploy`; AI-assisted migration through Agent Skills; 1,700+ unit tests and 380+ E2E tests ported from Next.js test suite.

* **Why it's notable**: This is an experiment in AI-driven development — the vast majority of code was written by Claude Code in one week. It demonstrates how far AI can go in replicating a complex, well-defined API surface. Offers an alternative to Vercel's toolchain with zero cold starts on Cloudflare Workers, though it's experimental and not yet production-hardened.

---

### vinext - 基于 Vite 重新实现的 Next.js API,支持灵活部署

* **功能介绍**: 一个 Vite 插件,完整重现了 Next.js 的 API 表面(路由、SSR、RSC、CLI),让现有 Next.js 应用可以运行在 Vite 工具链上而非 Next.js 编译器。支持 Pages Router 和 App Router,通过 `vinext init` 一键迁移。

* **主要特点**: 自动化迁移且保留现有 Next.js 配置;与 Next.js 16.x 达成 94% API 兼容;通过 Vite 实现快速热更新;内置 `vinext deploy` 命令部署到 Cloudflare Workers;支持 AI 辅助迁移(Agent Skills);包含从 Next.js 测试套件移植的 1700+ 单元测试和 380+ E2E 测试。

* **为何值得关注**: 这是一个 AI 驱动开发的实验项目——绝大部分代码由 Claude Code 在一周内完成。展示了 AI 在复制复杂、定义明确的 API 表面时能达到的程度。提供了 Vercel 工具链之外的选择,在 Cloudflare Workers 上实现零冷启动,但目前仍处于实验阶段,尚未经过生产环境验证。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/cloudflare/vinext)**

### Claude for Financial Services Plugins - Turn Claude into a Financial Services Specialist

* Transforms Claude into a domain expert for investment banking, equity research, private equity, and wealth management through modular plugins
* Delivers end-to-end workflows from data gathering to finished deliverables — build DCF models, draft CIMs, generate equity research reports, create IC memos, all with live data from 11+ financial data providers (Daloopa, FactSet, S&P Global, PitchBook, etc.)
* File-based architecture (markdown + JSON) with 41 skills, 38 slash commands, and zero infrastructure — customize with your firm's templates, processes, and terminology to make Claude work like it was built for your team

### Claude for Financial Services Plugins - 将 Claude 打造为金融服务专家

* 通过模块化插件将 Claude 转变为投资银行、股票研究、私募股权和财富管理领域的专家
* 提供从数据采集到成品交付的端到端工作流 — 构建 DCF 模型、起草 CIM 文件、生成股票研究报告、创建投资委员会备忘录,全部使用来自 11+ 金融数据提供商(Daloopa、FactSet、S&P Global、PitchBook 等)的实时数据
* 基于文件的架构(markdown + JSON),包含 41 项技能、38 个斜杠命令,无需基础设施 — 可使用公司模板、流程和术语进行定制,让 Claude 像为团队量身打造一样工作

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/anthropics/financial-services-plugins)**
